project_type: AWS CDK Python infrastructure project (serverless audio pipeline)
build_system: CDK CLI (cdk synth) with pip for dependencies. Must set NODE_OPTIONS='' and use pyenv Python 3.11.
test_framework: pytest with aws_cdk.assertions. Tests in tests/unit/. Shared fixture 'template' from tests/conftest.py that synthesizes CdkBaseStack.
build_command: export PYENV_ROOT="$HOME/.pyenv" && export PATH="$PYENV_ROOT/shims:$PYENV_ROOT/bin:$PATH" && export NODE_OPTIONS="" && cd /projects/sandbox/cdk-sleep-py-kiro && cdk synth
test_command: export PYENV_ROOT="$HOME/.pyenv" && export PATH="$PYENV_ROOT/shims:$PYENV_ROOT/bin:$PATH" && export NODE_OPTIONS="" && cd /projects/sandbox/cdk-sleep-py-kiro && pytest tests/ -v
verification_instructions: 1. Run pytest tests/ -v (all tests must pass). 2. Run cdk synth (must succeed cleanly). Both require NODE_OPTIONS='' and pyenv Python 3.11.
setup_instructions: export PYENV_ROOT="$HOME/.pyenv" && export PATH="$PYENV_ROOT/shims:$PYENV_ROOT/bin:$PATH" && pyenv global 3.11 && export NODE_OPTIONS="" && cd /projects/sandbox/cdk-sleep-py-kiro && pip install -r requirements.txt -r requirements-dev.txt
environment_constraints: COMMON_DEPENDENCIES network mode - can install from PyPI. NODE_OPTIONS must be unset (set to '') for jsii/CDK to work. Must use pyenv Python 3.11 (default shell is 3.9 which breaks jsii).
contribution_requirements: TDD-first: write failing tests before implementation. Use L2 CDK constructs. Least-privilege IAM. Commit messages use type prefixes (feat:, fix:, etc.). Update ARCHITECTURE.md after changes.
key_patterns: Stack code in cdk_base/cdk_base_stack.py (single stack class CdkBaseStack). Tests use 'template' fixture from conftest.py. Tests verify resource counts, properties, IAM policies, and state machine definition content via json.dumps inspection. State machine uses sfn_tasks.DynamoPutItem/UpdateItem and sfn_tasks.CallAwsService for Polly. Error handling uses add_catch() pattern.
directory_structure: cdk_base/ - stack definitions (single file cdk_base_stack.py). tests/unit/ - pytest test files. tests/conftest.py - shared fixtures. Root has app.py (CDK entry), requirements*.txt, ARCHITECTURE.md, AGENT_GUIDELINES.md.
